overall.description: A stationary nighttime view of a cyberpunk urban street featuring a prominent animated digital billboard advertisement for Nicola beverage. The scene overlooks a multi-lane road with sparse vehicle traffic, surrounded by modern high-rise architecture with neon lighting and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street with large digital billboard

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated observation of street traffic and urban environment from fixed position

entered.detail: Large vertical illuminated advertisement display showing Nicola beverage with Special Edition text and colorful radial graphics
Grid of solar panels mounted on the left building facade
Red and yellow neon circular rings atop the distant building behind the billboard
Line of palm trees along the right sidewalk bordering the street
Tall dark buildings with illuminated window patterns forming the city skyline
Multi-lane asphalt street with orange lane markings and moving vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view captures a cyberpunk city street at night, dominated by a large glowing Nicola beverage billboard in the center. The camera overlooks a multi-lane road with sparse vehicle traffic passing below, flanked by modern high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and a row of palm trees on the right sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, elevated perspective of a cyberpunk city street at night, centered on a vibrant digital advertisement. It begins with a wide view of the urban landscape, where a large, glowing Nicola beverage billboard dominates the central composition. The camera overlooks a multi-lane road as sparse vehicle traffic flows steadily below the towering architecture. This urban vista is framed by modern high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and a row of palm trees lining the right sidewalk.
